entries.spec_requirement_id: Ralph-loop invocation is uniform with no iteration cap
scenarios: no stale --max-iterations remains in invocation examples
exploration skills use the explicit completion-promise flag
acceptance_criteria: repo-wide grep for --max-iterations shows only CHANGELOG history + removal-description prose
data-engineering-exploration + domain-research-team express loops with --completion-promise flag

entries.spec_requirement_id: Superpowers is a hard-blocking, concretely-invoked dependency
scenarios: setup hard-blocks on a missing required plugin
every pipeline body declares a superpowers pre-flight gate
precedence of user instructions is preserved
acceptance_criteria: setup.py exits non-zero when a required plugin is missing
all 4 pipeline bodies declare a superpowers pre-flight abort gate naming the 4 superpowers skills
precedence note (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md wins) present in the canonical section

entries.spec_requirement_id: OpenSpec gates are identical across implementing pipelines
acceptance_criteria: mini body contains openspec validate --all --strict AND openspec archive
bug-fix body uses --all --strict on every openspec validate

entries.spec_requirement_id: All four plugins are verified at setup
scenarios: openspec-propose is in the verified set
acceptance_criteria: setup.py verifies openspec-propose (plugin id or resolvable skill); absence contributes to non-zero exit

entries.spec_requirement_id: A canonical uniform-plugin-usage contract governs all pipelines
scenarios: the canonical section exists and is referenced
no-bypass tool does not false-trip on legitimate openspec usage
acceptance_criteria: ## Uniform plugin usage (v3.9.0) exists in common-pipeline-conventions and is referenced by all 4 bodies
verify_no_pipeline_bypass does not emit openspec-bypassed for openspec-propose / openspec-change-folder runs; still emits for genuine bypass
